ddls:
CREATE TABLE "track_data" (
  "track_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each tracked object */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the tracking data */,
  "object_type" TEXT /* Type of the object (e.g., AV, AGENT, OTHERS) */,
  "x_position" REAL /* X-coordinate of the object's position */,
  "y_position" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the object's position */,
  "speed" REAL /* Speed of the object in km/h */,
  "direction" REAL /* Direction of the object in degrees */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the object is located */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source (e.g., sensor, camera) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the object is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id", "timestamp"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_data_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_data_object_type FOREIGN KEY ("object_type") REFERENCES object_types ("object_type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_data_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region or state where the city is located */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the city's data */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the city in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "data_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., sensor, camera) */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., sensor, camera) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the data source in percentage */,
  "update_frequency" TEXT /* Update frequency of the data source (e.g., every 1 minute, every 5 minutes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "object_types" (
  "object_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each object type */,
  "object_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the object type (e.g., AV, AGENT, OTHERS) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the object type */,
  "icon" TEXT /* Icon representing the object type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("object_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, administrator, planner) */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city the user is associated with */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to (e.g., transportation, planning) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "track_id" TEXT /* ID of the tracked object being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "query_params" TEXT /* Query parameters used for accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES track_data ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_reports" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "track_id" TEXT /* ID of the tracked object involved in the incident */,
  "incident_type" TEXT /* Type of the incident (e.g., accident, traffic violation) */,
  "incident_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the incident occurred */,
  "incident_description" TEXT /* Description of the incident */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the incident occurred */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the incident (e.g., reported, in progress, resolved) */,
  "severity" INTEGER /* Severity of the incident (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_reports_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_reports_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES track_data ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city for which the analysis was performed */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the analysis */,
  "congestion_index" REAL /* Congestion index (e.g., 0-100) */,
  "average_speed" REAL /* Average speed of vehicles in the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_analysis_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "public_transportation" (
  "transportation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each public transportation service */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the service is available */,
  "route_name" TEXT /* Name of the route */,
  "route_type" TEXT /* Type of the route (e.g., bus, train) */,
  "schedule" TEXT /* Schedule of the service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transportation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_public_transportation_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "urban_planning" (
  "planning_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each urban planning result */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city for which the planning was performed */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the planning */,
  "recommended_changes" TEXT /* Recommended changes to the urban infrastructure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("planning_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_urban_planning_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "safety_and_security" (
  "safety_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each safety and security measure */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the measure is implemented */,
  "measure_type" TEXT /* Type of the measure (e.g., surveillance cameras, emergency response) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("safety_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_safety_and_security_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)
